task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenEMR application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenEMR dashboard, calendar view, or main navigation sidebar is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent locates and opens the record for patient Philip Kuvalis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the patient dashboard or summary with the name 'Philip Kuvalis' and DOB '1990-04-21' visible in the header or patient frame.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Insurance section of the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Insurance' tab is active/highlighted, or the 'Add Insurance' modal/form is open.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct Insurance Company, Plan Name, and Relationship.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields show 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' (Company), 'PPO Standard' (Plan Name), and 'Self' (Subscriber Relationship).

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct Policy Number, Group Number, and Effective Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Form fields show Policy Number 'XWP845621379', Group Number 'GRP7845210', and Effective Date '2024-01-01'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the insurance information and it appears as the Primary insurance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's insurance list displays 'Blue Cross Blue Shield' listed under the 'Primary' category or with a 'Primary' label.

integrity.description: Agent uses the OpenEMR web interface to perform actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR browser interface, not command line tools or scripts.

integrity.description: Agent does not use SQL or database commands to insert data directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible performing database injections or SQL queries.

integrity.description: Agent enters data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is typed into OpenEMR input fields, not simulated in a text editor or mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Philip Kuvalis. DOB: 1990-04-21. Insurance Company: Blue Cross Blue Shield. Plan Name: PPO Standard. Policy Number: XWP845621379. Group Number: GRP7845210. Subscriber Relationship: Self. Effective Date: 2024-01-01. Insurance Type: Primary.
